checklist.criterion: Reads YAML template from assets/templates/ready-for-refinement.yaml before generating any output
Fetches PROJ-612 from Jira using jira_get_issue with at least summary, description, status, issuetype, issuelinks in fields
Does NOT fetch any incident ticket — no jira_get_issue call targets an INC-NNN key
Populates context.background from the ticket description, explaining the customer portal and the language-switching request
Sets ticket.type to Feature (not Bug, Maintenance, or Investigation)
Leaves ticket.linked_incident empty or omits it — does not invent an incident reference
conditions_of_satisfaction.must contains at least one MUST requirement derived from the ticket description
acceptance_criteria contains at least two specific, testable criteria relevant to multi-language support
Validates YAML with validate-ticket.sh and fixes any errors before proceeding to markdown generation
Generates markdown file at YYYY/MM/YYYY-MM-DD-PROJ-612-ready-for-refinement.md using today's date
Validates markdown structure with the --markdown flag after generation
Markdown does NOT contain a Linked Incident line (line is omitted, not left blank)
Reports YAML path, markdown path, validation result, and a one-paragraph summary on completion
